message:
fix(cli): extract diff_use_colors helper and suppress ANSI when writing to file

The diff command was checking io::stdout().is_terminal() even when output was
redirected to a file via --output, producing ANSI escape sequences in file
output when Auto color mode was active. Extracts diff_use_colors(color,
writing_to_stdout) that only checks is_terminal() when Auto mode AND writing
to stdout.

New test diff_color_auto_disables_ansi_when_writing_to_file verifies all
three color mode × destination combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
